mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM post ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post
deleted_at IS NULL
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.title, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS commentCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, false AS liked, (SELECT CONCAT('/uploads/images/', a.name) FROM attach a WHERE a.target = 'profile' AND a.target_id = m.id LIMIT 1) AS authorProfileImageUrl FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.member_id AS memberId, p.title, p.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.member_id = #{memberId}) AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_bookmark pb WHERE pb.post_id = p.id AND pb.member_id = #{memberId}) AS bookmarked, (p.member_id = #{memberId}) AS mine, (SELECT CONCAT('/uploads/images/', a.name) FROM attach a WHERE a.target = 'profile' AND a.target_id = m.id LIMIT 1) AS authorProfileImageUrl, t.id AS tripId, t.title AS tripTitle, t.start_date AS tripStartDate, t.end_date AS tripEndDate, t.member_count AS tripMemberCount FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id LEFT JOIN trip t ON t.id = p.trip_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (member_id, trip_id, title, content) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{tripId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS commentCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, false AS liked, (SELECT CONCAT('/uploads/images/', a.name) FROM attach a WHERE a.target = 'profile' AND a.target_id = m.id LIMIT 1) AS authorProfileImageUrl FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
